title: CandleRuntime transformer-path load + generate (safetensors-backed)
goal: Implement load + generate for the Transformer variant of CandleModelHandle: load safetensors weights via candle-transformers (Llama/Qwen/etc), generate streaming with sampler integration, ensure hooks (MT-082) fire at correct layer indices during forward.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/transformer.rs with TransformerModel trait + Llama impl; generate_transformer streaming function; tests (env-gated).
implementation_notes: TransformerModel trait abstracts over candle-transformers model implementations: `trait TransformerModel: Send + Sync { fn forward(&mut self, input_ids: &Tensor, hooks: &HookRegistry) -> Result<Tensor, CandleError>; fn n_layers(&self) -> u32; fn hidden_dim(&self) -> u32; fn vocab_size(&self) -> u32; }`. Initial concrete impl: LlamaModel wrapping candle_transformers::models::llama::Llama; future MTs can add Qwen, Mistral, etc. Load: read safetensors via candle_core::safetensors::load + VarBuilder; instantiate LlamaConfig from a config.json sibling; verify SHA256 of safetensors file matches LoadSpec.sha256_expected. Generate: tokenize prompt via tokenizer cache; loop forward(input_ids, &hook_registry) -> logits; sampler picks next token (reuse sampler module shape from MT-074 generalised); yield GeneratedToken stream; per-token cancellation poll; per-token hook callbacks fire as a side effect of forward (MT-082 plumbing). Per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER capabilities for Transformer variant: supports_lora=true (MT-084), supports_activation_steering=true, supports_subquadratic=false, supports_speculative_draft=false (not in scope for CandleRuntime in v02.186), supports_kv_prefix_cache=true (basic prefix-share). Tests (env-gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_CANDLE_MODEL_DIR pointing at a directory with config.json + tokenizer.json + safetensors + sha256.txt): load a small Llama-style model; generate 32 tokens deterministically (fixed seed); capture activations at layer 5 with hooks (verifies MT-082 integration end-to-end); cancel mid-stream within 100ms.
risk_if_missed: CandleRuntime transformer path missing; activation-hook techniques have no model to run against.
validator_focus: Hooks fire during forward (verified by counter incremented); SHA256 verification before load; cancel <100ms; deterministic output with fixed seed.

minimum_controls: Hook counter incremented during forward (proves wiring).
Generation determinism with fixed seed verified.
